Phases.title: Course Phases
Phases.description: Configure the dates and status of the course phases.
Phases.roadmap_subtitle: Management and control of the academic phases
Phases.institutional_notice_desc: Phases dictate the available tools for coordinators. Activating a phase shifts the entire platform context for all educational centers.
Phases.activation_hint: Activation overrides the current program state

Stats.title: Statistics
Stats.description: Advanced analysis of system usage, most requested workshops, and system activity.

Requests.subtitle: Monitor and manage center requests for the current course.
Requests.description: View center requests and assign workshops.

Requests.reject_confirm: Are you sure you want to reject this request? This action cannot be undone.

Requests.success_approve: Request approved and assignment generated successfully.

Verifications.title: Document Verification
Verifications.subtitle: Verify center documentation and report status.

Verifications.reason_placeholder: Describe the reason for the error here...

Closure.title: Closure and Certification
Closure.subtitle: Workshop completion, data locking, and issuance of official certificates.
Closure.description: Final management of workshops, certificates, and impact evaluation.
Closure.closure_success: Workshop closed and certificates issued correctly.
Closure.closure_error: Error closing the workshop. Check pending evaluations.
Closure.missing_evaluations_warning: Attention: {count} teacher evaluations are missing. Closure is possible, but these students might not receive the certificate correctly.
Closure.effect_lock_data: Attendance and evaluation data will be locked (read-only).
Closure.effect_generate_pdf: Official PDF files will be generated for eligible students.
Closure.effect_finish_phase: The workshop will move to the COMPLETED status and the cycle will be closed.

DesignateTeachersPage.page_subtitle: Designate the two referring teachers who will be responsible for monitoring.
DesignateTeachersPage.mandatory_description: It is necessary to designate two teachers to ensure that there is always a referent available for students and for communications with the CEB.
DesignateTeachersPage.teacher_designation_not_active: The teacher designation period is not active.
DesignateTeachersPage.designate_two_teachers: You must designate two referring teachers.
DesignateTeachersPage.teachers_must_be_different: The two teachers must be different people.

AssignmentEvaluationsPage.page_subtitle: Grade the performance of the students participating in the workshop.
AssignmentEvaluationsPage.no_enrollments: No enrollments found for this assignment.
AssignmentEvaluationsPage.instructions_desc: Remember that the competence evaluation is an indispensable requirement for the certification of the student's educational attention. You must value both technical and transversal competences.

PublicSurvey.title: Iter Ecosystem
PublicSurvey.subtitle: Workshop Self-Assessment
PublicSurvey.success_message: Thank you very much for your time. Your answers help us improve the Enginy Program.
PublicSurvey.error_no_survey: We found no pending surveys for you.
PublicSurvey.label_interest: Did you find the topic interesting?
PublicSurvey.label_clarity: Was the explanation of the activities clear and understandable?
PublicSurvey.label_material: Were the materials and tools appropriate and of good quality?
PublicSurvey.label_support: Did you feel helped and supported by the teacher?
PublicSurvey.label_overall: How would you rate your overall experience today?
PublicSurvey.label_teacher: How would you rate the teacher who taught the workshop?
PublicSurvey.label_future: Has it helped you decide on your professional future?
PublicSurvey.label_comments: Briefly tell us what you liked most (or what would you improve):
PublicSurvey.opt_future_yes: Yes, it has clarified my ideas.
PublicSurvey.opt_future_no: No, I already had it clear or it's not for me.
PublicSurvey.footer_note: Anonymous feedback for the center. Be honest!
